---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem in the starter or maintainer scripts.
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
---

## What Happened?

Describe the problem and what you expected instead.

## Reproduction

1. First step.
2. Second step.
3. Third step.

## Affected Area

- [ ] Content/frontmatter validation
- [ ] Locale-aware routing or language switching
- [ ] GitHub Pages/base path behavior
- [ ] Docs or migration guide
- [ ] CI, smoke checks, or maintainer scripts
- [ ] Other:

- Node version:

## Verification

- [ ] I ran `pnpm run verify`, or I explained why it cannot run.
- [ ] I checked that the issue does not depend on private content, paid integrations, or production-only cloud bindings.

## Logs

Paste only the relevant error lines. Do not include secrets, private URLs, tokens, analytics snapshots, or commercial integration details.
